name: @bolthub/pay
description: The bolthub payments SDK: charge for an MCP tool or HTTP endpoint — and pay for them — in a few lines. Lightning-only (L402) micropayments for AI-agent tool calls

scripts.build: rm -rf dist tsconfig.build.tsbuildinfo && bun build src/index.ts --outdir dist --target node --format esm --sourcemap=inline && cp dist/index.js dist/index.mjs && bun build src/index.ts --outdir dist --target node --format cjs --sourcemap=inline && bun build src/index.browser.ts --outfile dist/index.browser.mjs --target browser --format esm --sourcemap=inline && bun x tsc --emitDeclarationOnly --outDir dist --declaration --project tsconfig.build.json
